creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Well, I don't see any new shar/tar file attached to the PR, so adding 
back the port in its current state is not an option, since it does 
core-out bash under -STABLE. 

As and when you have a new shar/tarball, please feel free to resubmit it.
